problem id: d996d0b8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(5)

examples:
  00001011 -> 00000000
  11001101 -> 00000110
  01100110 -> 00000011
  00110110 -> 00000001
  10110011 -> 00000101
  11000011 -> 00000110
  01000010 -> 00000010
  01110101 -> 00000011
  01010101 -> 00000010

query: 01111100
predicted answer: 00000011
